#
# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE! This file is generated by `pwrforge update`.
#
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

list(APPEND CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/generators/")
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS ON)

# To support pure idf usage
if(NOT DEFINED ENV{pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET})
    set(ENV{pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET} "ESP32")
endif()

# Add definiton [ATSAM, ESP32, STM32, X86] depending on current build target
string(TOUPPER $ENV{pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET} pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET)
add_definitions(-D${pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET})

string(FIND "${pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET}" "ESP32" position)
if(NOT position EQUAL -1)
  include($ENV{IDF_PATH}/tools/cmake/project.cmake)
  set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
  set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS} $ENV{WORKAROUND_FOR_ESP32_C_FLAGS}")
  set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} $ENV{WORKAROUND_FOR_ESP32_CXX_FLAGS}")

  set(EXTRA_COMPONENT_DIRS src)
  set(IDF_TARGET esp32)
endif()

project(
  hmi_display_pilot
  VERSION 0.1.0
  DESCRIPTION "Project description."
  HOMEPAGE_URL "www.hello-world.com"
  LANGUAGES C CXX ASM)


if(NOT ${pwrforge_BUILD_TARGET} STREQUAL ESP32)
  set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/bin)
  add_subdirectory(src)
endif()
